name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Something broken — wrong file opened, no highlight, editor not launching
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

## What happened?

<!-- A clear description of the bug. What did you expect instead? -->

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...` (dev server command)
2. Open `http://localhost:...`
3. Hold Alt and hover / Alt+click on `...`
4. See error

## Environment

<!-- The framework + versions are the most important part of this report! -->

- **Framework & version**: <!-- e.g. Next.js 16.1, Vue 3.5, Svelte 5, Astro 5 -->
- **Bundler / dev server**: <!-- e.g. Turbopack, Webpack, Vite 6, Vue CLI, CRA -->
- **React version** (if applicable): <!-- 18 or 19 — it changes the strategy -->
- **Extension version**: <!-- shown in the popup, e.g. v1.1.0 -->
- **Browser**: <!-- e.g. Chrome 138, Edge, Brave -->
- **OS**: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **Editor & open mode**: <!-- e.g. VS Code via dev server (auto) / custom URL template -->
